G1856.strongs_def: to expel; by implication, to propel

G1887.strongs_def: occurring on the succeeding day, i.e. (G2250 (ἡμέρα) being implied) to-morrow

G1881.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G450 (ἀνίστημι);
G1881.strongs_def: to stand up on, i.e. (figuratively) to attack

G1888.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G846 (αὐτός) and (the dative case singular of) a derivative of (a thief);
G1888.strongs_def: in theft itself, i.e. (by analogy) in actual crime

G1868.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G134 (αἰνέω);

G1829.derivation: from a comparative of G1537 (ἐκ) and a presumed (to spue);

G1822.derivation: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of G739 (ἄρτιος);
G1822.strongs_def: to finish out (time); figuratively, to equip fully (a teacher)

G1840.strongs_def: to have full strength, i.e. be entirely competent

G1834.strongs_def: to consider out (aloud), i.e. rehearse, unfold

G1894.strongs_def: since now, i.e. (of time) when, or (of cause) whereas
G1894.kjv_def: after that, because, for (that, -asmuch as), seeing, since

G1879.derivation: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G373 (ἀναπαύω);
G1879.strongs_def: to settle on; literally (remain) or figuratively (rely)

G1885.derivation: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G757 (ἄρχω) (meaning a governor of a district, "eparch");
G1885.strongs_def: a special region of government, i.e. a Roman præfecture

G1886.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and an equivalent of G833 (αὐλή);
G1886.strongs_def: a hut over the head, i.e. a dwelling

G1801.derivation: middle voice from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G3775 (οὖς);
G1801.strongs_def: to take in one's ear, i.e. to listen

G1827.strongs_def: to convict fully, i.e. (by implication) to punish

G1825.strongs_def: to rouse fully, i.e. (figuratively) to resuscitate (from death), release (from infliction)

G1828.strongs_def: to drag forth, i.e. (figuratively) to entice (to sin)

G1863.strongs_def: to superinduce, i.e. inflict (an evil), charge (a crime)

G1875.strongs_def: a particle of indefinite contemporaneousness; whenever, as soon as

G1893.strongs_def: thereupon, i.e. since (of time or cause)
G1893.kjv_def: because, else, for that (then, -asmuch as), otherwise, seeing that, since, when

G1843.strongs_def: to acknowledge or (by implication, of assent) agree fully

G1848.derivation: a variation of G1847 (ἐξουδενόω) and meaning the same
G1848.kjv_def: contemptible, despise, least esteemed, set at nought

G1890.strongs_def: to foam upon, i.e. (figuratively) to exhibit (a vile passion)

G1836.derivation: from G2192 (ἔχω) (in the sense of taking hold of, i.e. adjoining);

G1851.derivation: from a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning to stand out);

G1810.derivation: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G160 (αἰφνίδιος);

G1821.strongs_def: to send away forth, i.e. (on a mission) to despatch, or (peremptorily) to dismiss

G1824.derivation: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the genitive case singular feminine of G846 (αὐτός) (G5610 (ὥρα) being understood);
G1824.kjv_def: by and by, immediately, presently, straightway

G1860.strongs_def: an announcement (for information, assent or pledge; especially a divine assurance of good)

G1816.strongs_def: to start up out of the ground, i.e. germinate

G1883.strongs_def: up above, i.e. over or on (of place, amount, rank, etc.)

G1831.kjv_def: come (forth, out), depart (out of), escape, get out, go (abroad, away, forth, out, thence), proceed (forth), spread abroad

G1891.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) (in the sense of devoted to) and (Venus);

G1804.derivation: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος);

G1813.strongs_def: to smear out, i.e. obliterate (erase tears, figuratively, pardon sin)

G1862.strongs_def: a self-committal (by assurance of conferring some good)

G1823.strongs_def: to lighten forth, i.e. (figuratively) to be radiant (of very white garments)

G1892.strongs_def: to rouse upon, i.e. (figuratively) to excite against

G1880.strongs_def: to come up on, i.e. return

G1832.derivation: third person singular present indicative of a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and G1510 (εἰμί);
G1832.strongs_def: so also neuter present participle of the same (with or without some form of G1510 (εἰμί) expressed); impersonally, it is right (through the figurative idea of being out in public)

G1807.strongs_def: actively, to tear out; middle voice, to select; figuratively, to release

G1826.strongs_def: to issue, i.e. leave (a place), escape (to the shore)

G1845.strongs_def: one that binds by an oath (or spell), i.e. (by implication) an "exorcist" (conjurer)

G1811.strongs_def: to follow out, i.e. (figuratively) to imitate, obey, yield to

G1876.derivation: neuter of a presumed compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G318 (ἀνάγκη);

G1839.strongs_def: to put (stand) out of wits, i.e. astound, or (reflexively) become astounded, insane
G1839.kjv_def: amaze, be (make) astonished, be beside self (selves), bewitch, wonder

G1877.strongs_def: to lead up on, i.e. (technical) to put out (to sea); (intransitively) to return

G1874.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G202 (ἀκροατής);

G1837.derivation: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2278 (ἠχέω);
G1837.strongs_def: to "echo" forth, i.e. resound (be generally reported)

G1896.derivation: and other moods and persons of the same tense; from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1492 (εἴδω);

G1819.derivation: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of the same as G160 (αἰφνίδιος);

G1847.derivation: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of the neuter of G3762 (οὐδείς);
G1847.strongs_def: to make utterly nothing of, i.e. despise

G1820.derivation: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G639 (ἀπορέω);
G1820.strongs_def: to be utterly at a loss, i.e. despond

G1833.strongs_def: to test thoroughly (by questions), i.e. ascertain or interrogate

G1809.derivation: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G154 (αἰτέω);

G1844.strongs_def: to exact an oath, i.e. conjure

G1861.derivation: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος);
G1861.strongs_def: to announce upon (reflexively), i.e. (by implication) to engage to do something, to assert something respecting oneself

G1849.derivation: from G1832 (ἔξεστι) (in the sense of ability);
G1849.strongs_def: privilege, i.e. (subjectively) force, capacity, competency, freedom, or (objectively) mastery (concretely, magistrate, superhuman, potentate, token of control), delegated influence
G1849.kjv_def: authority, jurisdiction, liberty, power, right, strength
G1849.usage: power(69x), authority(29x), right(2x), liberty(1x), jurisdiction(1x), strength(1x)

G1898.derivation: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G1521 (εἰσάγω);

G1805.strongs_def: to buy up, i.e. ransom; figuratively, to rescue from loss (improve opportunity)

G1854.strongs_def: out(-side, of doors), literally or figuratively
G1854.usage: without(23x), out(16x), forth(8x), outward(1x), strange(1x), away(1x)

G1846.strongs_def: to dig out, i.e. (by extension) to extract (an eye), remove (roofing)

G1850.kjv_def: exercise authority upon, bring under the (have) power of

G1882.derivation: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G461 (ἀνορθόω);
G1882.strongs_def: a straightening up again, i.e. (figuratively) rectification (reformation)

G1817.strongs_def: objectively, to produce, i.e. (figuratively) beget; subjectively, to arise, i.e. (figuratively) object

G1812.derivation: plural ordinal from G1803 (ἕξ) and G1540 (ἑκατόν);
